flowOutcomes.benefit: User can turn a governance control into evidence review.
flowOutcomes.action: Open /controls and click Open evidence pack or Open JSON.
flowOutcomes.evidence: The evidence pack page or control templates API returns visible evidence/control data.

flowOutcomes.benefit: Reviewer can approve or reject a review-required AI action.
flowOutcomes.action: Open /approvals?orgId=org-smoke and click Approve or Reject on a pending item.
flowOutcomes.evidence: Approval API records approvalHash and redirects with lastDecision.

flowOutcomes.benefit: User can export portable audit evidence for buyer, auditor, or consultant review.
flowOutcomes.action: Open /evidence-pack and click Download signed evidence bundle.
flowOutcomes.evidence: Evidence bundle API returns bundleHash, eventHashes, and signature metadata.

userOutcome: All audited DSG flows expose user benefit, real action, evidence, and tangible output.
